name: screen_capture
description: Capture current edit-time screen, return the image data. If camera_position and look_at_position are provided, the camera will be temporarily set to the camera_position and look at the look_at_position.

camera_position.description: The position of the camera to capture the screen from.

items.description: The x, y, z coordinate of the camera position.
The x, y, z coordinate of the look at position.
